special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Each of five playable X-Men (Beast, Cyclops, Gambit, Psylocke, Wolverine) has different moves and capabilities activated by specific control combinations. Psylocke noted as having the most techniques of all characters.

special_mechanics.name: Multi-Character System
special_mechanics.description: Shared life pool across all five X-Men rather than individual health per character. Players can select which character to use for level progression after initial story progression.

tier_notes: T2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. No numerical physics parameters documented in available sources. Game praised for tight gameplay and responsive controls but specific movement parameters not disclosed.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - X-Men: Mutant Apocalypse
